required_state.reason: The trainable adapter must resume from the committed state.
Optimizer moments affect every subsequent parameter update.
The learning-rate schedule must continue at the restored step.
The next deterministic batch is derived from the restored global step.
Python random state is part of the declared stochastic state.
NumPy random state is part of the declared stochastic state.
Torch random state controls training dropout.
The recurring adapter checkpoint must identify the immutable frozen base.

restore_order_requirements: Validate the manifest, completion marker, and checksums before deserialization.
Validate the immutable base identity and hash before restoring model partitions.
Restore adapter, optimizer, scheduler, global step, and all declared RNG state before the next batch.
assumptions: The controlled workload is CPU-only and uses step-derived batches.
The frozen base is immutable for the lifetime of the run.
warnings: Checkpoint loadability alone is not evidence of correct continuation.
